subject: CLARIFICATION: Over-match OK, non-tango matches BAD
body:
Booker,

Ybotman clarified the matching rules:

## ACCEPTABLE
- Over-matching to WRONG tango event (e.g., matched "La Vista Practica" to "Berkeley Practica") = OK
- We can fix tango-to-tango mismatches later

## NOT ACCEPTABLE  
- Matching to NON-tango events (e.g., "Oaklash Festival" = queer festival, not tango)
- These pollute the calendar with non-tango content

## FILTER STRATEGY

When validating FB event matches:
1. Check if FB event title/description contains tango keywords:
   - "tango", "milonga", "practica", "vals", "milonguero"
2. If no tango keywords → SKIP (not a tango event)
3. If has tango keywords → ACCEPT (even if wrong match)

## EXAMPLE

- "Oaklash Festival 2026" → no tango keywords → SKIP
- "Berkeley Tango Practica" → has tango → ACCEPT

— Harvey
